TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Brahim Ghali Pulasin-Kali I 1949 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Brahim Ghali, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Salawi-Arapiya Finawlan-Kapolong Kitakit o kallopitahidang 0 West sahara;西撒哈拉) anini i ci Brahim Ghali, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' 出生家庭 lalamod 配偶 salikaka 兄弟姐妹 natayalan 事蹟 pitooran 宗教
S.PHON: b~b~vraħim *ħaɾi po~u~uɾasin-kaɾi i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi b~b~vraħim *ħaɾi, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u saɾawi-arapija finawɾan-kapo~uɾo~uŋ kitakit o~u kaɾɾo~upitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ * wəst saħara;****) anini i ʦi b~b~vraħim *ħaɾi, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. kaso~ufo~uʦan a ɾo~umaʡ **** ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** saɾikaka **** natajaɾan ** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: Brahim Ghali Pulasin-Kali I 1949 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Brahim Ghali, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Salawi-Arapiya Finawlan-Kapolong Kitakit o kallopitahidang 0 West sahara;西撒哈拉) anini i ci Brahim Ghali, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' 出生家庭 lalamod 配偶 salikaka 兄弟姐妹 natayalan 事蹟 pitooran 宗教
S.PHON: b~b~vraħim *ħaɾi po~u~uɾasin-kaɾi i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi b~b~vraħim *ħaɾi, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u saɾawi-arapija finawɾan-kapo~uɾo~uŋ kitakit o~u kaɾɾo~upitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ * wəst saħara;****) anini i ʦi b~b~vraħim *ħaɾi, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. kaso~ufo~uʦan a ɾo~umaʡ **** ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** saɾikaka **** natajaɾan ** pito~uo~uran **
